summary: Iteration 77 - Testing CRM and UI updates: Running marquee header, trash/restore system, bulk delete, New Inquiries WhatsApp-only filter, and Assign button. All features verified working.
test_credentials: Admin auth via localStorage: asrAdminAuth=true, asrAdminEmail=support@asrenterprises.in
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: 1) Running marquee header on homepage with exact text 'Get up to ₹78,000 Subsidy under PM Surya Ghar Yojana Call Now: 9296389097 WhatsApp for Quote' - WORKING, 2) GET /api/crm/leads returns correct pagination structure with leads array and pagination object - WORKING, 3) GET /api/crm/leads/trash returns soft-deleted leads - WORKING, 4) POST /api/crm/leads/restore restores leads from trash - WORKING, 5) POST /api/crm/leads/bulk-delete soft-deletes multiple leads - WORKING, 6) All Leads tab has bulk delete button (data-testid='bulk-delete-all-leads-btn') when leads are selected - WORKING, 7) Trash tab displays in CRM dashboard sidebar with restore functionality - WORKING, 8) New Inquiries tab shows Assign button instead of WhatsApp button (data-testid='assign-lead-{id}') - WORKING, 9) New Inquiries only fetches WhatsApp leads (source=whatsapp filter) - WORKING, 10) Auto-sync feature enabled for New Inquiries (every 15 seconds) - WORKING.

backend: GET /api/crm/leads - returns pagination structure with leads array
POST /api/crm/leads/restore - validates empty list, restores leads
POST /api/crm/leads/bulk-delete - validates empty list, soft-deletes leads
GET /api/crm/new-leads/count?source=whatsapp - returns count of WhatsApp leads
frontend: Running marquee header visible on homepage with data-testid='marquee-bar'
Marquee contains exact required text: 'Get up to ₹78,000 Subsidy under PM Surya Ghar Yojana Call Now: 9296389097 WhatsApp for Quote'
All Leads tab has bulk delete button when leads selected
Trash tab displays in CRM sidebar with Trash2 icon
Trash tab shows restore button when leads selected
New Inquiries tab shows 'WhatsApp Inquiries' header
New Inquiries has Assign button per lead row
New Inquiries has auto-sync toggle (every 15 seconds)
New Inquiries fetches only WhatsApp source leads

features_verified.running_marquee_header: WORKING - Visible on homepage with exact required text and orange gradient background
features_verified.crm_leads_pagination: WORKING - GET /api/crm/leads returns leads array with pagination object
features_verified.trash_endpoint: WORKING - GET /api/crm/leads/trash returns soft-deleted leads with 30-day retention
features_verified.restore_endpoint: WORKING - POST /api/crm/leads/restore restores leads from trash
features_verified.all_leads_bulk_delete_ui: WORKING - Red delete button appears when leads are selected in All Leads tab
features_verified.trash_tab_ui: WORKING - Trash tab in sidebar with restore functionality
features_verified.new_inquiries_assign_button: WORKING - Assign button replaces WhatsApp button in New Inquiries tab
features_verified.new_inquiries_whatsapp_only: WORKING - New Inquiries only fetches WhatsApp source leads
features_verified.auto_sync_feature: WORKING - Auto-sync enabled for New Inquiries (15s interval)
